title: DIC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 02 Assistant Manager Posts
description: The Digital India Corporation (DIC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Assistant Manager Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, MBA, and Post-graduation can apply for the DIC Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, a...
